—Tier 5

Client mod that shows PakTiers PvP tiers directly in player nametags.

1.28 MB

# Pak TierTagger

Pak TierTagger is a client-side Fabric mod that automatically fetches and displays PvP tier rankings from PakTiers directly on player nametags — so you always know who you're up against, without leaving the game.

✨ Features

  • 🏷️ Live tier tags on nametags — See every player's PvP tier displayed above their head in real time
  • 🎮 Multiple gamemode tiers — Supports Sword, Axe, Crystal, Pot, SMP, UHC, Neth Pot, Mace, and more
  • 🔍 In-game player search — Look up any player's tier without leaving the game
  • ⌨️ Keybinds — Quickly cycle gamemodes “G” or open the player search screen “Y”

📋 Requirements

  • Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.1
  • Fabric Loader ≥ 0.16.0
  • Fabric API
  • ModMenu ≥ 11.0.3
  • Java 21+
Server Ranks

PakTiers Rank Perks

Support the server and unlock extra in-game perks with an Apex, Prime, or Elite rank. Reach out to staff on Discord to get set up.

Elite
Entry-level rank for supporters getting started.
  • Custom Elite chat tag & colored name
  • Access to the Elite-only lounge
  • Elite rank Discord role
250 PKR
Message staff to redeem
Prime
Mid-tier rank with extra commands and perks.
  • Everything in Elite, plus more
  • Custom Prime chat tag & colored name
  • Custom trims in-game
  • Priority queue when testing
  • Prime rank Discord role
500 PKR
Message staff to redeem
Top Rank
Apex
The highest rank with the full set of perks.
  • Everything in Prime, plus more
  • Custom Apex chat tag & colored name
  • Custom trims in-game
  • Top priority queue when testing
  • Exclusive Apex Discord role & badge
1000 PKR
Message staff to redeem

Ranks are activated manually by the PakTiers staff team. Join the Discord server and open a ticket for details on how to get your rank.
